task_spec.objective: Read .opencode/project-mode.yaml and extract depth + rigor to configure Gateway behavior for this session.
constraints: File may not exist — default to depth=balanced, rigor=false
Session-only verbal overrides do not write to the file
depth=thorough forces rigor=true regardless of file value
success_conditions: Returns an object with depth (string) and rigor (boolean)
depth is one of: urgent, balanced, thorough
non_goals: Does not write or modify project-mode.yaml
Does not handle session-only overrides (those are runtime, not file state)
Does not validate unrelated yaml fields

unknown_state: Whether user will issue verbal overrides this session

blocked_outputs: depth not in the 3 admissible values
depth=thorough with rigor=false (must be forced true)

carried_obligations_to_successors: depth value controls failure-response behavior (urgent=workaround, thorough=root-cause)

required_traces: Whether rigor was force-set due to depth=thorough

known_bad_fixtures.intended_reason: depth=thorough but rigor=false — must be force-set to true
rigor='yes' is a string, not a boolean

on_violation.contract_revision: Add default fallback when depth is invalid
Add post-read coercion: if depth=thorough, set rigor=true
Add type coercion for non-boolean rigor values

admission.composition_interface: output.depth and output.rigor feed step2.5-anti-sycophancy and all downstream steps
